rewrite.text:
PROVE plus_zero_identity: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
  GOAL: n + 0 = n
  INDUCTION n
    PROVE BASE_CASE: n = 0
      SIMPLIFY RHS: 0 + 0 = 0 [BY plus_def, reflexivity]
      THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0
      CONCLUDE: Base case holds [QED]
    PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE: n = S n'
      ASSUME n' : ℕ
      INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: ∀m. m + 0 = m
      SIMPLIFY RHS: S n' + 0 = S (n' + 0) [BY plus_def]
      APPLY IH SPLIT INTO: (1) n' + 0 = n' [BY ih]
      PROVE (1): n' + 0 = n'
        SIMPLIFY RHS: n' + 0 = n' [BY plus_def]
        THEREFORE n' + 0 = n'
        CONCLUDE: Subgoal holds [QED]
      SIMPLIFY LHS: S (n' + 0) = S n' [BY plus_def]
      THEREFORE S n' + 0 = S n'
      CONCLUDE: Inductive case holds [QED]
  CONCLUDE: By induction on n, n + 0 = n for all n [QED]
END
